new_findings: anchor-test-each adjudicator: aggregate anchor test 16 failures are pure validator cross-pollution (shared PDAs 12y3Uh6s..., 8SFqwq..., BqScmyjm...) when running 13 files in one ledger. Per-file isolation: ALL GREEN at 310 passing. Lombard protocol behavior is correctly verified; no protocol bug surfaced.

binary_or_command: direct read of EVM Mailbox.sol _deliverAndHandle and Solana mailbox handle_message.rs; comparison of failure semantics
new_findings: new_signal_id=SIG-XR-003-EVM-DIVERGENCE: EVM Mailbox._deliverAndHandle wraps IHandler.handlePayload in try/catch and only sets handledPayload[payloadHash]=true on success; handler revert does NOT bubble, message remains Delivered and re-attemptable. Solana mailbox.handle_message writes Handled then invoke_signed, Anchor tx atomicity rolls back Handled on recipient CPI revert. Both layers still gate literal replays via PDA init dedupe keyed on [MESSAGE_SEED, payload_hash]. Net effect: Solana requires a brand-new tx after failed gmp_receive; EVM allows retry through deliverAndHandle.

PROP-XR-EVM-006 confirmed: handler revert absorbed by Mailbox._deliverAndHandle try/catch; payload remains re-attemptable (MessageHandled re-runs handler each call); 2-test pair passes. PROP-XR-EVM-007 confirmed: AssetRouter.changeBascule(address(0)) under DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE disables Bascule.validateMint entirely; same payload, no report, mint proceeds and totalSupply grows by mint amount. Non-admin caller is rejected.
